title: BBC visits aftermath of Israeli strike on Lebanon that killed family as IDF targets Hezbollah
summary_full: A relative tells BBC those killed were civilians and not Hezbollah operatives, but the Israel Defense Forces says it was targeting "terrorist infrastructure".
summary_public: A relative tells BBC those killed were civilians and not Hezbollah operatives, but the Israel Defense Forces says it was targeting "terrorist infrastructure".
